title: MyFurniture
description: Add new custom furniture in the game very easily ! Collisions are based on the 3D model !
body:
![MyFurniture logo banner](https://imgur.com/DxxSJDi.png) [![Discord button](https://imgur.com/3WcEg5g.png)](https://discord.gg/splugins)[![Wiki button](https://imgur.com/VQzcXrm.png)](https://docs.ssomar.com/myfurniture/information-mf)[![Premium button](https://imgur.com/zcpmF5s.png)](https://discord.com/channels/701066025516531753/1333041782010937385) [![download requirements](https://imgur.com/Bm2lEYh.png)](https://modrinth.com/plugin/executableitems)
# What is MyFurniture ? Our powerful plugin allows you to add a bunch of Furniture to your server, and adding unique activators on them! With MyFurniture, the possibilities are truly endless. Dive into a realm where MMO/RPG ambiance meets boundless possibilities. With MyFurniture, you hold the reins - craft and control your custom furniture precisely the way you envision. Over 100 furniture are included by default - and the creation process is extremely easy to understand. Particularly in our experienced in-game editor. (start to create with /mf editor) # Break the Axis limitation ! Your furniture can be placed everywhere ! Aligned, non aligned, at the middle on a block ,on two blocks ! It's better than a real block. # Perfect Hit and Bounding box Your furniture will have a perfect hit and bounding box. MyFurniture is not like all other simple plugin that create 1*1 bounding box. With MF the furniture bounding box match with the your custom texture ! Normally you only see that in custom mod ! But now its possible without client edits with MyFurniture.
![demo](https://i.ibb.co/s1qXSdD/gif-mf-ezgif-com-gif-to-webp-converter.webp)
# Server performances optimized You can place a ton of furniture at no cost for the server ! All furniture are packets based and the calculations are Async. # Client performances The furniture due to the usage of custom textures and a custom bounding box require more client performances because there are many calculation. Due to that we offer a way for the players that have an old configuration to define their furniture settings. They can choose how many furniture they want to render around them, the view distance of the furniture and define the bounding box range. # Auto import your texture pack You have just to drag and drop your textures into the folder __textures__, then run the command /mf pack ! and your furniture will be auto imported and directly ready to use. Many furniture packs available on ElitesCreatures ! # Sit features Your furniture can sit on your furniture by clicking on them ! The player will be able to sit where he wants on the furniture ! there is no boring predefined location.
![sit](https://i.ibb.co/f4PnJbY/gif-mf2-ezgif-com-gif-to-webp-converter.webp)
# Storage features Your furniture can stock items ! The inventory of the furniture is the same as a chest. Multiple people can open it and modify it, it is persistent along server restarts. If you break the furniture the inventory will be dropped. And It is compatible with many claim / land / island / region plugins # Very easy to use & fully documented We have optimized the processes to make the configuration very simple but with the ability to do complex things. And you will be able to find a large documentation in our wiki ! You'll be amazed compared to other plugins! # Access to Triggers / Activators Unleash your creativity with the activators of MyFurniture . With this unique feature of MF you will be able to execute everything in almost every situation ! In addition we continuously add optimized new activators to serve your needs. With these activators you can render your furniture dynamic and add all abilities you want ! (wiki) # Custom requirements With the plugin you can add all requirements you want to for your activators, some are already implemented to make your life simple ! (Money, Mana, Experience, Items, Magic from Ecoskills) But you can easily add your custom requirements since it supports the placeholders from the other plugins ! (wiki) Custom conditions and custom commands There is no part we forget ! In the activators you will be able to check and run everything. We worked hard on a custom library SCore that offers more than 100 custom conditions and more than 100 custom commands. (wiki) # Cooldowns You can add cooldowns on your furniture & activators, but not a simple cooldown ! A cooldown with many features : custom time in sec or ticks, custom cooldown message, pause cooldown when the player disconnect, pause cooldown depending on the placeholders of the player, you can also add global cooldown for all players. # Many Plugins supported - Claim & Protections plugins : WorldGuard, Lands, IridiumSkyblock, SuperiorSkyblock2, GriefPrevention, GriefDefender, Residence, PlotSquared, Towny, Terra, ... - Mana Plugins: Aurelium Skills, EcoSkills, MMOCore - Enchants plugins All should be compatible but here are small list: AdvancedEchanments, Enchants Squared, ExcellentEnchants, Eco Enchants .. - Custom Drop plugins: MythicMobs, LevelledMobs, RoseLoots, Wildstacker, .. - Shop Plugins: ShopGui+, ShopKeepers, Tradesplus ... [![Discord button](https://imgur.com/3WcEg5g.png)](https://discord.gg/splugins)[![Wiki button](https://imgur.com/VQzcXrm.png)](https://docs.ssomar.com/myfurniture/information-mf)[![Premium button](https://imgur.com/zcpmF5s.png)](https://discord.com/channels/701066025516531753/1333041782010937385)
